title: Ability to add more than one Doc in the Doc/Meeting Notes Column
excerpt: Hello!  I love the ability to add a document (meeting notes, etc.) into a column but it would be even better to have the ability to create more than one document here.  For example, in our client board we use this column…

posts.author: lalahess (Linda Sikes )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I love the ability to add a document (meeting notes, etc.) into a column but it would be even better to have the ability to create more than one document here. For example, in our client board we use this column for meeting notes. It would be nice to have multiple meetings notes in the column instead of having multiple columns. Similar to adding more than one file to the files column.
Thanks!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lalahess

I would recommend using a files column instead so you can add as many as you like! It will mean 2 clicks instead of 1 for the doc creation but does mean multiple docs/files.

Let me know if you get stuck

posts.author: rayzelb (rayzel broyde)
posts.cookedHtml: Its interesting. On one board it lets me add more then one doc and on the other board it wont let me. any clues why? I tried checking all the settings and dont see any differences.
